core_philosophy: A Whimsical-style unlimited mind map tool. Optimistic, approachable pastels grounded by harsh, utilitarian black borders. This 'tactile brutalism' prevents the app from feeling childish and provides sharp contrast for productivity.

layout.spacing_scale: Tailwind standard (p-4, p-6, p-8), but doubled for containers (e.g., p-8 to p-12 for dashboard wrappers).
layout.floating_toolbars: absolute z-50 bg-white border-2 border-black shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] rounded-xl p-2 flex gap-2 items-center

buttons.primary: bg-black text-white font-bold py-2 px-4 rounded-lg border-2 border-black shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-black font-bold py-2 px-4 rounded-lg border-2 border-black shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] hover:bg-gray-50 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] transition-all
buttons.accent_yellow: bg-[#FDE047] text-black font-bold py-2 px-4 rounded-lg border-2 border-black shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] transition-all

cards.dashboard_map_card: bg-white border-2 border-black rounded-xl p-0 overflow-hidden shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] hover:-translate-y-2 hover:shadow-[8px_8px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] transition-all duration-200 cursor-pointer flex flex-col group
cards.thumbnail_area: h-40 bg-gray-50 border-b-2 border-black relative overflow-hidden flex items-center justify-center bg-[radial-gradient(#D1D5DB_2px,transparent_2px)] [background-size:12px_12px]

inputs.text: w-full bg-white border-2 border-black rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-['Work_Sans'] text-black focus:outline-none focus:ring-4 focus:ring-[#FDE047] focus:border-black transition-all shadow-[2px_2px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)]

mind_map_nodes.base: absolute border-2 border-black shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] flex items-center justify-center p-4 min-w-[120px] min-h-[60px] cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing hover:ring-4 hover:ring-black/10 transition-shadow

interactions_and_motion.hover: Neo-brutalist lift: -translate-y-1 and increase hard shadow offset to 6px or 8px.
interactions_and_motion.active: Press down effect: translate-y-1 and reduce shadow offset to 0px.
interactions_and_motion.transitions: Use `transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out` for all hover states.

accessibility_and_testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements MUST have a `data-testid` attribute (kebab-case). Examples: `login-submit-button`, `create-map-button`, `map-card-{id}`, `export-png-button`, `share-link-button`, `node-{id}`, `canvas-area`.
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Text inside pastel nodes must be pure black (#000000) or dark charcoal (#111827) to meet APCA contrast ratios.

images.description: Abstract creative 3D shapes. Use as a decorative side panel on the authentication screen (Login/Register). Give it a border-l-2 border-black.
Colorful sticky notes on a board. Use this inside the 'Empty State' placeholder when the user has 0 mind maps on their dashboard. Add a soft opacity or grayscale blend if needed to fit the aesthetic.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Portuguese ('pt-BR') locale for all visible text, as defined in 'language.common_terms'.

Implement the authentication flow using standard forms and Shadcn UI elements but heavily overwrite Shadcn's default Vercel-like styling to match the Neo-brutalist pastel theme (border-2 border-black, solid shadows like shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)]).

For the Mind Map Canvas, implement an infinite pan/zoom area. You MUST use 'reactflow' (React Flow) which perfectly handles nodes and edges, but style the custom nodes using the 'mind_map_nodes' CSS rules defined above. Do not use default React Flow styles.
Add a minimap and smooth zoom controls for the canvas (essential for UX in 2026 patterns).
Use '@phosphor-icons/react' for UI icons (install via yarn add @phosphor-icons/react) to fit the modern bold aesthetic.
Ensure the floating toolbars on the canvas are wrapped in draggable or absolute positioned containers with the 'floating_toolbars' styles.
Implement the PNG export (e.g. using html-to-image) and Public Share features as specified, ensuring the public view is completely read-only.
CRITICAL: Do not use 'Inter' for headings. Ensure 'Outfit' and 'Work Sans' are imported via Google Fonts in index.css.
All cards, buttons, and inputs MUST have the hard black shadow `shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)]` and solid 2px borders.
Provide functionality to edit node colors, shapes, and text via a floating toolbar that appears when a node is selected.
